reviews.review_title: Not my best purchase but not my worst.
reviews.review_description: I have played this game for about 2 hours and it is Very repetitive. Please add a free drive mode.
Absolute trash!I hate it!Don't buy it!It's so glithy!It's worse than watching paint dry!

Developers
Game Needs more depth and development to fix motion sickness.

I don’t get Motions sickness at all and I play flight sims, car racing sims but this setup made me terribly motion sick. 

Check out CarX rally or similar for how to fix this. A smooth 3rd person view is needed less sharp quick movement.etc

The game is truly enjoyable! I usually experience motion sickness in these types of games, but I didn't encounter such an issue in this one. The game captivated me in every aspect, and I genuinely enjoyed it. It was a delightful experience.
An impressive racing experience that draws you in with its gameplay and atmosphere. We are waiting for more levels :)
The developers didn’t even try to make this game good. It lacks content and the motions are the worse I’ve played.

This is the first ATV game I’ve seen. Realistic graphics and feels so real. Exciting to play such a different kind of game. Great to have lots of different maps that allow to play even at night atmosphere. Excellent work!
An awsome job. I really enjoyed. This game is very excited. These guys know how to make a great environment 👍 I recommend everyone to check this out !
